name: Dfns
description: MPC wallet-as-a-service API for institutions to create, embed, and manage programmable wallets.

seo.title: Dfns — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: Dfns: MPC wallet-as-a-service API for institutions to create, embed, and manage programmable wallets.

when_to_use: MPC wallet creation API for institutional custody apps
Embedded wallet provisioning for fintech user onboarding
Programmable signing policy enforcement per transaction type
Multi-party approval workflow for high-value crypto transfers
HSM-backed key management API for crypto infrastructure

pros: MPC wallet-as-a-service with SOC 2 and policy engine
Institutional-grade key management without self-custody ops
Clean API and webhooks suited for fintech backends
cons: Enterprise pricing; not friendly for small projects
Still requires compliance work on your side
Fewer UX-ready components than Privy or Dynamic
Vendor lock-in on key shares and policy model
review.verdict: Solid MPC wallet infrastructure for regulated fintechs that want policy and compliance over UX primitives.
review.best_for: Institutions, exchanges and fintechs needing programmable custody APIs
review.not_for: Consumer dApps prioritizing social login and embedded UX

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
